post.text_content:
Still feels a little unreal to say this…

I’m excited to share that I’ve officially joined Morgan Stanley as a Site Reliability Engineer in Bengaluru. 🚀 

This opportunity means a lot to me, and I’m genuinely excited for everything that’s ahead—learning from some of the best, solving real-world engineering problems, and growing every single day.

This journey wouldn’t have been the same without a few amazing people.

Rajan Chettri — thank you for your guidance and for always pointing me in the right direction.



And a very special thanks to Charupriya M . Your guidance, patience, and constant support made this journey so much smoother. I really appreciate all the time and effort you invested in helping me.

Here’s to new challenges, continuous learning, and building reliable systems that keep the world running. Let’s get started! 💙

#MorganStanley #SRE #SiteReliabilityEngineering #DevOps #TechCareers #Bengaluru #NewBeginnings #mthree

post.text_content:
Hi everyone!👋🏻

I'm seeking a new role and would appreciate your support. If you hear of any opportunities or just want to catch up, please send me a message or comment below. I'd love to reconnect. #OpenToWork

🧾About me & what I'm looking for:

I'm looking for GRC Openings (Information Security Consultant, Information Security Analyst, Risk Consultant, and Cyber Security Consultant roles).

🔧Key Competencies: 
Implementation & Auditing of 
• ISO 27001 : ISMS (Information Security)
• ISO 22301 : BCMS (Business Continuity)
• ISO 9001 : QMS (Quality)
• ISO 27701 : PIMS (Privacy)
• ISO 42001 : AIMS (Artificial Intelligence)
• Digital Personal Data Protection Act
• SEBI CSCRF, Guidelines & Circulars
• RBI IT Master Directions & IT Outsourcing

📍I'm open to roles in Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Kerala, Coimbatore & Chennai.

#OpenToWork #Connections #CyberJobs #GRCjobs #Openings #Cybersecurity

Private vs Government Job 😊😊

Private: Layoffs anytime.
Government: Job Security.

Private: More responsibility, more innovation.
Government: lunch ke baad aana + Job Security.

Private: Higher salary, higher BP.
Government: Public service fees accepted separately + Job Security.

Private: Work till 11 PM, get pizza.
Government: Leave at 5 PM, get + Job Security.

Private: Performance-based growth.
Government: Age-based promotion. + Job Security.

Not saying which is better... your views ?



Do you agree ?
#layoffs
